text: Cash generation quality remained exceptional in Q4 2025, with operating cash flow of $52.4 billion and free cash flow of $24.6 billion. The free cash flow margin stood at 21.56%, demonstrating strong conversion of revenue into cash available for capital allocation. EBITDA reached $45.5 billion in Q4, translating to an EBITDA margin of 39.91%. This substantial cash generation supports the company's significant capital expenditure program while maintaining flexibility for shareholder returns and strategic investments.
